title: [MTR] TGV Duplex
description: TGV Duplex & Thalys addon for Minecraft Transit Railway.
body:
This addon for Minecraft Transit Railway adds the TGV Duplex to the game.

Five full-train liveries are provided:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- TGV Duplex Carmillon
- TGV Duplex Atlantique (Silver)
- TGV Duplex Lyria
- TGV Duplex Ouigo
- TGV Duplex Ouigo España

And then power cars meant to be coupled with cars from the [Atlantique Pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mtr-tgv-atlantique-thalys) :
- TGV POS Atlantique
- TGV POS Lacroix
- TGV PBKA Thalys
- TGV PBKA Eurostar

As well as the following power car :
- TGV Réseau-Duplex

</details>



Each car for each livery has at least two versions : An "F" version (forwards) and a "B" version (backwards), determining which way the car will be pointed. 
Additionally, "CC" version have the coupler closed, while "CO" versions have it open.

There are four types of cars in the pack:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- Power cars (two pantograph heights are provided : 5 blocks and 6 blocks. Please use the one most adapted to your network)
- End cars (passenger cars that are meant to go after the power car, and have a special cone on the top. Two per train) (1st and 2nd class)
- Standard cars (1st and 2nd class)
- Bar cars (one per train)

</details>

The old standalone bogies are no longer necessary.

Make sure to check the license if you're interested in making other liveries. Additionally, you are allowed to use this ressource pack in servers, let's plays and other creations providing that you give credit.

## Enjoy it!

**[Check out my other TGV packs!](https://modrinth.com/collection/jzC7uozr)**
